name: cosy-domain-provider-systemtest
description: Systemtests für den Cosy Domain Provider

scripts.test: dotenv -e .env.local -- env STAGING_AUTH_USERNAME= STAGING_AUTH_PASSWORD= ADMIN_PORTAL_API_KEY= playwright test
scripts.test:staging:admin: dotenv -e .env.local -- env BASE_URL=https://staging.domain-provider.cosy-hosting.net RUN_ADMIN_TESTS=1 SKIP_APP_TEST_USER_SETUP=1 playwright test tests/specs/admin.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:staging:mfa-ui: dotenv -e .env.local -- env BASE_URL=https://staging.domain-provider.cosy-hosting.net RUN_MFA_UI_TESTS=1 playwright test tests/specs/mfa-ui.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:staging:stripe: dotenv -e .env.local -- env BASE_URL=https://staging.domain-provider.cosy-hosting.net RUN_STRIPE_TESTS=1 playwright test tests/specs/billing-stripe.spec.ts --workers=1
